calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jul-13-2012 Off Calendar

Petition Under Probate Code 15660 For Appointment Of Trustee To Fill Vacancy
Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-10-293236 Estate of Ronald Bertolozzi.

Appearances: Richard Collier for Dennis McGuire. Steven Miyake for Vincent Philbrook and Donna Hulsey.

The Parties agreed to have Ms. Trecher remain as Temporary Trustee. Mr. Collier will file a motion to bifurcate issues in the Estate proceeding. The Petition to Revoke Probate of Will was continued to December 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status of the civil matter. The Petition for Appointment of Trustee to Fill Vacancy in the Trust matter was withdrawn and taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Contreras.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Proof Of Payment Of Filing Fees
Off Calendar Sep-12-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Proof Of Payment Of Filing Fees
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Continued To Sep-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Collier for Dennis McGuire.

Mr. Collier stated that he was on his way to pay the filing fee. The matter was continued to September 12, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition Under Probate Code 15660 For Appointment Of Trustee To Fill Vacancy
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Continued To Sep-26-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was heard with case number PES-10-293236 Estate of Ronald C. Bertolozzi.

Appearances: Steven Miyake for Donna Hulsey, Vincent Philbrook and Linda Trechter. Richard Collier for Dennis McGuire.

Mr. McGuire's opposition filed on May 6, 2011 in the Trust matter will not be considered until the filing fees are paid. Status of proof of payment of filing fees in the Trust matter was set for August 22, 2011 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204. Fees are to be paid by August 18, 2011. Mr. Collier requested a 60-day continuance for Counsel to determine how to proceed with the issue of transfer of title of property (civil matter pending). Both matters were continued to September 26, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court wants to see further briefing on the language in the Trust with regard to the issue of standing. Mr. Miyake's brief is due by September 12, 2011. Mr. Collier's brief is due by September 19, 2011. The Court asked the Parties to reconsider mediation in the Estate matter.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
